senses.gloss: a protrusion, especially one in a curb bit for a horse's mouth
a protuberant portion of a millstone, the middle of which attaches to an axis
a protuberant portion of a millstone, the middle of which attaches to an axis; a name for the constellation Ursa Minor

etymology.text: From the root ف ء س (f ʔ s), meaning "to cleave or split", "to wedge or dig into", "to cut into", "to hew down". Compare Akkadian 𒂆 (pāšu, “axe, adze”).
